docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES, JOHN T AS TO DEFENDANT FRANZONE,  CELIA SUMMONS ISSUED

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION IT IS SO ORDERED THAT IN LIEU OF PERSONAL SERVICE A COPY OF THE SUMMON AND COMPLAINT IN THIS ACTION MAY BE POSTED ON THE FRONT DOOR FO 494 MADRID ST, SAN FRANCISCO AND FORTHWITH BE MAILED TO DEFENDANT AT HER ONLY KNOWN RESIDEN- TIAL ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES, JOHN T

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES, JOHN T SERVED MAR-21-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FRANZONE,  CELIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, JOHN T RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANZONE,  CELIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 494 MADRID STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FRANZONE,  CELIA
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $40.00 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF JONES, JOHN T

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER STAYING EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT IT IS ORDERED THAT THE APPLICATION FOR STAY OF ENFORCEMENT BE AND IS GRANTED AND THAT EXECUTION ON THE JUDGMENT BY WAY OF SHERIFF' EVICTION IS STAYED UNTIL TERMS OF STIPULATION FILED BY DEFENDANT FRANZONE,  CELIA

STIPULATION AND ORDER THAT ANDREW MIZZARO AND ESTHER MIZZZARO SHALL IMMEDIATELY VACATE THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 446 PARIS ST. CELIA FRANZONE SHALL PAY THE AMOUNT OF MORTGAGE IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,536.12 DUE ON THE 28TH OF EACH AND EVERY MONTH. THAT VERNON BRADLEY SHALL PUT SIGN UPON THE PROPERTY LOCATED AT 494 MADRID ST. (SEE STIPULATION)
